result.stdout:
1.1.0+7b126e5486abd99c51067a22e924862dde170d8a

Command-line interface for Azure Custom Translator service.

Usage: translator [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  config        Mandatory configuration. Use your Translator API key and region
                obtained from Azure portal or portal.customtranslator.azure.ai
                portal.
  document      Commands related to document management.
  model         Commands related to model management.
  project       Commands related to project management.
  workspace     Commands related to workspace management.

Run 'translator [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
1.1.0+7b126e5486abd99c51067a22e924862dde170d8a

Command-line interface for Azure Custom Translator service.

Usage: translator [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  config        Mandatory configuration. Use your Translator API key and region
                obtained from Azure portal or portal.customtranslator.azure.ai
                portal.
  document      Commands related to document management.
  model         Commands related to model management.
  project       Commands related to project management.
  workspace     Commands related to workspace management.

Run 'translator [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Mandatory configuration. Use your Translator API key and region obtained from Azure portal or portal.customtranslator.azure.ai portal.

Usage: translator config [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  delete        Removes selected configuration set.
  list          Shows current settings.
  select        Selects which config set is currently active. Use this command
                to switch between subscriptions.
  set           Sets speech API key.

Run 'config [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Sets speech API key.

Usage: translator config set [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>      Name of the config set. If Creates new one if not found,
                        otherwise updates existing one.
  -k|--key <KEY>        Translator API subscription key.
  -r|--region <REGION>  Translator API region. Default: global
  -s|--select           Make this subscription active after storing settings.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information

result.stdout:
Commands related to document management.

Usage: translator document [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Show help information

Commands:
  list    Lists documents in your workspace.
  status  Shows status of document import.
  upload  Uploads a combo document or a parallel document pair. Usage:
          translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp
          {languagePair} -c {comboFilePath} [-o] *OR* translator document upload
          -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -s
          {sourceFilePath} -t {targetFiePath} -pn {name} [-o]

Run 'document [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Uploads a combo document or a parallel document pair. Usage: translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -c {comboFilePath} [-o] *OR* translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -s {sourceFilePath} -t {targetFiePath} -pn {name} [-o]

Usage: translator document upload [options]

Options:
  -ws|--Workspace                 (Required) Workspace ID.
  -dt|--DocumentType              (Required) Document type
                                  (Training|Testing|Tuning|Phrase|Sentence).
  -lp|--LanguagePair              Language pair (format xx:yy. eg. en:fr).
  -c|--combo-file <COMBO_FILE>    Path of Combo file
                                  (.TMX|.XLF|.XLIFF|.LCL|.XLSX|.ZIP file
                                  required).
  -s|--source-file <SOURCE_FILE>  Path of source file [Parallel]
                                  (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file
                                  required).
  -t|--target-file <TARGET_FILE>  Path of target file [Parallel]
                                  (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file
                                  required).
  -pn|--ParallelName              Document name of parallel file set.
  -o|--override                   Override document if it exists.
  -j|--json                       Return output as JSON.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for upload completion.
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

commands.payload:
Uploads a combo document or a parallel document pair. Usage: translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -c {comboFilePath} [-o] *OR* translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -s {sourceFilePath} -t {targetFiePath} -pn {name} [-o]

Usage: translator document upload [options]

Options:
  -ws|--Workspace                 (Required) Workspace ID.
  -dt|--DocumentType              (Required) Document type
                                  (Training|Testing|Tuning|Phrase|Sentence).
  -lp|--LanguagePair              Language pair (format xx:yy. eg. en:fr).
  -c|--combo-file <COMBO_FILE>    Path of Combo file
                                  (.TMX|.XLF|.XLIFF|.LCL|.XLSX|.ZIP file
                                  required).
  -s|--source-file <SOURCE_FILE>  Path of source file [Parallel]
                                  (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file
                                  required).
  -t|--target-file <TARGET_FILE>  Path of target file [Parallel]
                                  (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file
                                  required).
  -pn|--ParallelName              Document name of parallel file set.
  -o|--override                   Override document if it exists.
  -j|--json                       Return output as JSON.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for upload completion.
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

result.stdout:
Commands related to model management.

Usage: translator model [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Show help information

Commands:
  create  Creates new model.
  delete  Deletes specified model.
  deploy  Deploy or undeploy a model.
  list    Lists all the models for the given project.
  show    Shows details of specified model.
  train   Train a model.

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Commands related to model management.

Usage: translator model [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Show help information

Commands:
  create  Creates new model.
  delete  Deletes specified model.
  deploy  Deploy or undeploy a model.
  list    Lists all the models for the given project.
  show    Shows details of specified model.
  train   Train a model.

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates new model.

Usage: translator model create [options]

Options:
  -p|--project-id <PROJECT_ID>      (Required) Project ID.
  -n|--name <NAME>                  (Required) Model name (max 100 chars).
  -d|--document-ids <DOCUMENT_IDS>  (Required) Document IDs (comma separated).
  -t|--train                        Initiate training [default is False].
  -j|--json                         Return output as JSON.
  -w|--wait                         If --train is true, will stop and wait for
                                    training completion.
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information

  -t|--train                        Initiate training [default is False].
  -j|--json                         Return output as JSON.
  -w|--wait                         If --train is true, will stop and wait for
                                    training completion.

result.stdout:
Deploy or undeploy a model.

Usage: translator model deploy [options]

Options:
  -m|--model-id <MODEL_ID>  (Required) Model ID.
  -na|--NorthAmerica        North America region - set to 'true' to deploy
                            (default), 'false' to undeploy.
  -eu|--Europe              North America region - set to 'true' to deploy
                            (default), 'false' to undeploy.
  -as|--AsiaPacific         North America region - set to 'true' to deploy
                            (default), 'false' to undeploy.
  -j|--json                 Return output as JSON.
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information

result.stdout:
Creates new project.

Usage: translator project create [options]

Options:
  -ws|--Workspace                 (Required) Workspace ID.
  -n|--name <NAME>                (Required) Project name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>  Project description.
  -lp|--LanguagePair              Language pair (format xx:yy. eg. en:fr).
  -c|--category <CATEGORY>        Category.
  -cd|--CategoryDescriptor        Category descriptor (max 75 chars).
  -label|--Label                  Label (max 30 chars).
  -j|--json                       Return output as JSON.
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

staticCommands.description: Uploads a combo document or a parallel document pair. Usage: translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -c {comboFilePath} [-o] *OR* translator document upload -w {workspaceId} -dt {documentType} -lp {languagePair} -s {sourceFilePath} -t {targetFiePath} -pn {name} [-o]

options.description: Path of Combo file (.TMX|.XLF|.XLIFF|.LCL|.XLSX|.ZIP file required).
Document name of parallel file set.
Path of source file [Parallel] (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file required).
Path of target file [Parallel] (.TXT|.HTML.|.HTM|.PDF|.DOCX|.ALIGN file required).
Will stop and wait for upload completion.

staticCommands.name: select
staticCommands.description: Selects which config set is currently active. Use this command to switch between subscriptions.

values.name: name
values.description: Configuration set name. This will be selected for all API operations. Case sensitive.

options.description: Name of the config set. If  Creates new one if not found, otherwise updates existing one.
Make this subscription active after storing settings.
